name: Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans of red kidney beans, drained and rinsed.
1 package of yellow corn, barely thawed.
1/4 to 1/2 cup of S & W salsa (heat is up to you; mild preferred).
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the drained and rinsed kidney beans with the barely thawed yellow corn.
2. Add the finely chopped red onion.
3. Stir in the desired amount of salsa (from 1/4 to 1/2 cup).
4. Mix in the chopped cilantro, lemon juice, and balsamic vinegar.
5. Allow the salad to sit for a while; it will develop more flavor over time.
6. Adjust the taste by adding sugar if you prefer a sweeter profile.
